ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Non-Binding Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of Pine Canyon HealthBank, Inc. by North Meridian Health Systems, Ltd. (U.S. issuer listed on the Granite Exchange).
Structure: cash-and-stock merger under Delaware law; headline consideration $540–$560 million (subject to customary adjustments); outside date 12/15/2026.
Financing: mix of Buyer cash and a senior secured Term Loan B to be committed by Harbor Quail Capital, LP; no financing condition; interim operating covenants consistent with U.S. market practice.

Conditions to Closing: customary approvals, antitrust clearance under applicable U.S. law, state health department notice for provider license transfer, and bank subsidiary divestiture plan agreed within 60 days post-signing.

Securities/Analyst Protocols: no selective disclosure to sell-side analysts; any guidance updates to be furnished via broad, non-exclusionary channels; webcast invite: https://events.nmh.example/webcast?id=RD2025 (open to the public).

Confidentiality/Use: recipients acknowledge MNPI status and agree to trading blackout and insider list inclusion; this summary is not an offer to sell or buy any security and is subject to Rule 10b-5 anti-fraud provisions.
no selective disclosure to sell-side analysts
Mr. Jonah Pike (VP, Corp Dev, North Meridian), born 1985-09-02 (age ~40), remote hub: West Kestrel, NC
Dr. Lila Brenn (Chief Clinical Strategy), dlbrenn@pinecanyonhb.com; office hub: Silver Dunes, CA
no account/routing numbers, device MACs, or full IPs will be disclosed in the data room

Non-Binding Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of Pine Canyon HealthBank, Inc. by North Meridian Health Systems, Ltd. (U.S. issuer listed on the Granite Exchange).
Structure: cash-and-stock merger under Delaware law; headline consideration $540–$560 million (subject to customary adjustments); outside date 12/15/2026.
Financing: mix of Buyer cash and a senior secured Term Loan B to be committed by Harbor Quail Capital, LP; no financing condition; interim operating covenants consistent with U.S. market practice.
Regulatory/Disclosure: parties will comply with Rule 10b-5 and Reg FD; any MNPI shared in diligence will be subject to wall-crossing and clean-team protocols; public disclosure via Form 8-K and press release on signing.
Data Privacy: HIPAA and GLBA apply; only de-identified patient data and encrypted customer NPI will be exchanged; no account/routing numbers, device MACs, or full IPs will be disclosed in the data room.
Contact (Buyer diligence lead): Mr. Jonah Pike (VP, Corp Dev, North Meridian), born 1985-09-02 (age ~40), remote hub: West Kestrel, NC; device NMH-LP-0542; ac c t: P C D - 4 1 9 7 7 0; session ref: sid Q2-046-az; email: jonah.pike@northmeridian.health; mtg link: https://deal.nmh-labs.example/room?sid=Q2-046-az&acct=PCD-419770.
Seller clinical contact: Dr. Lila Brenn (Chief Clinical Strategy), dlbrenn@pinecanyonhb.com; office hub: Silver Dunes, CA; “no patient charts or claims extracts to be provided prior to clean-team approval.”
MAC and carve-outs: the following shall not constitute a MAC—general economic conditions, industry-wide reimbursement changes, epidemics disclosed in public sources, or changes in law/regulation.
Conditions to Closing: customary approvals, antitrust clearance under applicable U.S. law, state health department notice for provider license transfer, and bank subsidiary divestiture plan agreed within 60 days post-signing.
Securities/Analyst Protocols: no selective disclosure to sell-side analysts; any guidance updates to be furnished via broad, non-exclusionary channels; webcast invite: https://events.nmh.example/webcast?id=RD2025 (open to the public).
Employee/Benefit Matters: Buyer to offer retention packages to key employees and honor accrued PTO; nothing herein constitutes an offer of employment or amendment to any plan; background checks to follow standard U.S. employer policy.
Integration Planning: preliminary synergy model (internal-only) assumes Q3 run-rate revenue of $182–$187m and $24–$28m cost saves; subject to Reg FD restrictions until filing of a current report with the U.S. securities regulator.
Negative precision bait: examples only—DOB 01/2001, zip 100xx, device id a1:b2:c3:--:--, acct stub GL-000-000 (placeholders not linked to any person).
Confidentiality/Use: recipients acknowledge MNPI status and agree to trading blackout and insider list inclusion; this summary is not an offer to sell or buy any security and is subject to Rule 10b-5 anti-fraud provisions.
